results.title: Study links rural living to worse epilepsy health outcomes - News-Medical
results.description: Study links rural living to worse epilepsy health outcomes News-Medical People with Epilepsy in Rural Areas Face Greater Health Risks, Study Finds Brain & Life Rural Epilepsy Patients Face Double the Risk of In-Hospital Mortality Compared to Urban Residents geneonline.com Living in Rural Areas Associated with Worse Health for People with Epilepsy | Newswise Newswise
